label: WISeR skin readiness — L36690 (CGS J15 / Ohio)

CMS_WISER_OPERATIONAL_GUIDE_V6.title: CMS WISeR Provider and Supplier Operational Guide v6.0

CMS_MCD_L36690.title: Wound Application of CTPs, Lower Extremities (L36690)

CMS_MCD_A56696.title: Billing and Coding: Wound Application of CTPs, Lower Extremities (A56696)
CMS_MCD_A56696.license_note: AMA-licensed CPT content; codes referenced by ID only per ADR-0006

PILOT_CLINICAL_WORKFLOW.title: Wound-care workflow signals from research interviews

applicability_rules.message_template: WISeR readiness screening is limited to Original Medicare fee-for-service cases. Coverage type submitted: {coverage_type}.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: WISeR Model applies to Original Medicare only.
applicability_rules.next_action: Follow the payer-specific workflow for this coverage type.

applicability_rules.message_template: WISeR applies to services rendered on or after 2026-01-15. Service date submitted: {service_date}.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: CMS WISeR FAQ distinguishes the 2026-01-01 model start from the 2026-01-15 service applicability date.
applicability_rules.next_action: Use the standard Medicare workflow for this date.

applicability_rules.message_template: State '{state}' is not within the six-state WISeR pilot region.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: WISeR pilot covers AZ, NJ, OH, OK, TX, WA per CMS-WISER-MODEL.
applicability_rules.next_action: Use the standard Medicare workflow for this state.

applicability_rules.message_template: The skin-substitute workflow is not currently active in this state under the applicable MAC. State submitted: {state}.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: L36690 is the CGS J15 / Ohio rule pack. Other active WISeR skin states require their applicable rule pack.
applicability_rules.next_action: Follow the standard Medicare workflow for this state.

applicability_rules.message_template: LCD L36690 covers lower-extremity DFU, neuropathic ulcer, VSU/VLU, and full-thickness trauma ulcers. Wound type submitted: {wound_type}.
applicability_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' enumerates these three wound classes.
applicability_rules.next_action: Use the appropriate LCD for this wound type.

evidence_rules.message_template: L36690 requires skin deficit ≥ 1.0 cm. Documented size is {wound_bed.wound_size_cm_sq} cm.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' requires skin deficit at least 1.0 cm in size.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm wound size measurement before review.

evidence_rules.message_template: L36690 requires adequate circulation: ABI ≥ 0.60 or toe pressure ≥ 30 mmHg. Documented ABI: {vascular_evidence.abi_value}; toe pressure: {vascular_evidence.toe_pressure_mmhg}.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' requires evidence of adequate circulation/oxygenation.
evidence_rules.next_action: Provide ABI or toe-pressure documentation that meets the threshold.

evidence_rules.message_template: DFU coverage under L36690 requires > 4 weeks of documented conservative wound care with failure to respond. Documented duration: {standard_care.care_duration_days} days; failure documented: {standard_care.care_failed_or_unresponsive}.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' requires neuropathic/DFU to have failed > 4 weeks of documented conservative care.
evidence_rules.next_action: Document additional conservative care or provide existing documentation.

evidence_rules.message_template: VSU coverage under L36690 requires ulcer present ≥ 3 months (90 days). Documented duration: {standard_care.ulcer_duration_days} days.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' requires venous stasis ulcer present at least 3 months.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm ulcer-present duration meets the 3-month threshold.

evidence_rules.message_template: VSU coverage under L36690 requires ≥ 30 days of unresponsive appropriate care. Documented duration: {standard_care.unresponsive_care_duration_days} days.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' requires unresponsive appropriate care for at least 30 days with documented compliance.

evidence_rules.message_template: Trauma/injury ulcer coverage under L36690 requires ≥ 4 weeks of appropriate control of the underlying cause. Documented duration: {standard_care.care_duration_days} days.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' requires full-thickness ulcers from abscess/injury/trauma to have failed appropriate control for at least 4 weeks.
evidence_rules.next_action: Document additional underlying-cause control before review.

evidence_rules.message_template: L36690 requires documented appropriate non-weight-bearing or offloading for DFU/neuropathic cases. Offloading documented: {standard_care.offloading_documented}.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' lists offloading as a required standard-of-care component for DFU.
evidence_rules.next_action: Document offloading method (boot, cast, footwear modification) before review.

evidence_rules.message_template: L36690 requires documented compression therapy for VSU. Compression documented: {standard_care.compression_documented}.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' lists compression as a required standard-of-care component for VSU.
evidence_rules.next_action: Document compression method (multilayer dressings, ≥ 20 mmHg stockings, or pneumatic).

evidence_rules.message_template: L36690 requires for DFU cases that the medical record reflect Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes diagnosis and medical management. Diagnosis documented: {standard_care.diabetes_diagnosis_documented}; management documented: {standard_care.diabetes_management_documented}.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Coverage Indications' requires both diabetes diagnosis and medical management for DFU eligibility.
evidence_rules.next_action: Confirm both diabetes diagnosis and management documentation before review.

evidence_rules.message_template: L36690 caps CTP applications at 10 per wound per 12-week period. This case reports {episode_history.applications_so_far_in_episode} applications in the current episode.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Limitations' caps applications at 10 per wound per 12-week period of care.
evidence_rules.next_action: If the episode window has closed, start a new episode. Otherwise discontinue CTP and pursue alternative treatment.

evidence_rules.message_template: L36690 contraindicates CTP grafts when active infection is present. Active infection: {infection_evidence.active_infection}.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Limitations' lists active infection as a contraindication.
evidence_rules.next_action: Resolve the active infection before CTP application.

evidence_rules.message_template: L36690 contraindicates CTP grafts when diabetes is uncontrolled.
evidence_rules.rationale_template: L36690 §'Limitations' lists uncontrolled diabetes as a contraindication.
evidence_rules.next_action: Document diabetes management plan and stability before CTP application.

validation_rules.message_template: One or more product codes do not match the HCPCS Level II format (letter + 4 digits).
validation_rules.rationale_template: Format check; not a coverage rule.

changelog.note: Initial L36690 slice encoding from CLM-017 through CLM-047 (T-007).
